## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional commit message used in the PR title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`, `perf:`, `revert:`)
- [ ] `npm run ci` passes locally
- [ ] JSDoc / type exports updated for any new or changed public API
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry is not needed (release-please handles it automatically from commit messages)
